title: Trimmable Minimal Armor (Mod Support)
description: This makes all armour(armor) more minimal so that you can see the player's skin more. Works with trims and some mods.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/631ad0b4c1c80cdeebf0b154e3b2ddb677bcf2bd.png)


Need a server for you and your friends? click the image below:

[![](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=16230)

# Minimal Armour (Trimmable)
This Pack changes the armour of Vanilla and some mods so you can see more of your skin while also being able to tell that you're wearing armour. While others have done this before but what makes mine stand out is that it has mod support.

## Latest News
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/RH7R7xZwdo0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Vanilla Armour
![All Armours Updated](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d35c20e6d265bb09bc2ebdcf50267c1651b0d88b.png)

## Trims
Only Vanilla Trims are supported as of now:
![Trims 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c3972bc4f57ef40c792668f06fa1a1cea0fafe5.png)
![Trims 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/900fa96a63c18b40b78c33530ce034b0c7d39bc7.png)

## Mods Supported (Check Gallery for Looks)
- [Advanced Netherite](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-netherite)
- [Alex's Caves](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-caves)
- [Alex's Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Aquaculture 2](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquaculture)
- [Aquamirae](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquamirae)
- [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend)
- [BetterNether](https://modrinth.com/mod/betternether)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
- [Deeper and Darker](https://modrinth.com/mod/deeperdarker)
- [Galosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere)
- [Ice and Fire: Dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons)
- [IceAndFire Community Edition](https://modrinth.com/mod/iceandfire-ce)
- [Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks)
- [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm)
- [Mystical Agriculture](https://modrinth.com/mod/mystical-agriculture)
- [Overgeared](https://modrinth.com/mod/overgeared)
- [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether)
- [Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest)
- [The Undergarden](https://modrinth.com/mod/the-undergarden)

If you would like to see a mod supported, please ask in the [Google Form](https://forms.gle/d9sgFWJdY14x8ia2A), the Comments of [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/minimal-armour-trimmable/comments) or The Trailer Videos.
